name_cn:
New Arrival❤️ Lipstick Makeup Bag
A high-appeal makeup bag is here. The twisted handle is exquisite. It fills the bag with a sense of luxury.
The capacity is huge, and it comes with a makeup mirror. It is simply a savior for beauty lovers!
Must-have item❤️
Size: 9.5×17×7.8cm
Style: 6622
